title: Kangaroo Level 1-2 - Mixed Practice Set 2
disclaimer: Original practice problems inspired by Math Kangaroo format. Not official AKSF content.

questions.question_text: A flower shop has 3 red roses, 4 yellow roses, and 2 white roses on display. How many roses are there in total?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 300 100" width="300" height="100"><circle cx="30" cy="50" r="12" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><circle cx="60" cy="50" r="12" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><circle cx="90" cy="50" r="12" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><circle cx="130" cy="50" r="12" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><circle cx="160" cy="50" r="12" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><circle cx="190" cy="50" r="12" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><circle cx="220" cy="50" r="12" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><circle cx="255" cy="50" r="12" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><circle cx="285" cy="50" r="12" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/></svg>
questions.image_description: Nine rose circles in three color groups
questions.solution: Adding 3 + 4 + 2 gives 9 roses.

questions.question_text: Which shape below shows a triangle inside a square?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 300 80" width="300" height="80"><rect x="10" y="15" width="50" height="50" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><polygon points="35,25 20,55 50,55" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"/><text x="30" y="78" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10">A</text><circle cx="95" cy="40" r="22" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><text x="90" y="78" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10">B</text><rect x="130" y="18" width="45" height="45" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><rect x="140" y="28" width="25" height="25" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"/><text x="145" y="78" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10">C</text><polygon points="210,20 190,60 230,60" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><text x="205" y="78" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10">D</text><rect x="250" y="18" width="40" height="40" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><circle cx="270" cy="38" r="10" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"/><text x="265" y="78" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10">E</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Five shape options labeled A to E
questions.solution: Option A shows a triangle inside a square.

questions.question_text: At the market, an apple costs 2 coins and a pear costs 3 coins. How many coins does Lisa need to buy one apple and one pear?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 200 150" width="200" height="150"><circle cx="50" cy="55" r="22" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><line x1="50" y1="33" x2="50" y2="25" stroke="currentColor"/><text x="40" y="95" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="11">apple</text><text x="38" y="112" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="11">2 coins</text><path d="M 140 35 Q 128 45 128 65 Q 128 85 145 90 Q 162 85 162 65 Q 162 48 148 38 Z" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><line x1="145" y1="38" x2="145" y2="28" stroke="currentColor"/><text x="135" y="110" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="11">pear</text><text x="128" y="125" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="11">3 coins</text><text x="88" y="70" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="18">+</text></svg>
questions.image_description: An apple labeled 2 coins plus a pear labeled 3 coins
questions.solution: 2 + 3 = 5 coins.

questions.question_text: The pattern below uses leaves and flowers. What shape comes next in the sequence?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 300 80" width="300" height="80"><ellipse cx="25" cy="40" rx="12" ry="6" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><circle cx="70" cy="40" r="10" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="115" cy="40" rx="12" ry="6" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><circle cx="160" cy="40" r="10" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="205" cy="40" rx="12" ry="6" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><text x="250" y="45" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="20">?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Alternating leaves and flowers ending with question mark
questions.solution: The pattern alternates leaf, flower. After leaf comes a flower.

questions.question_text: Tom feeds his rabbit every morning. If today is Tuesday, what day will it be after he feeds the rabbit two more times?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 200 150" width="200" height="150"><rect x="15" y="40" width="40" height="40" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><text x="20" y="65" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10">Tue</text><text x="28" y="95" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="14">1</text><text x="62" y="65" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="16">→</text><rect x="80" y="40" width="40" height="40" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><text x="88" y="65" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10">?</text><text x="93" y="95" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="14">2</text><text x="127" y="65" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="16">→</text><rect x="145" y="40" width="40" height="40" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><text x="153" y="65" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10">?</text><text x="158" y="95" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="14">3</text><text x="30" y="120" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10">today</text><text x="145" y="120" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10">2 more</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Three day boxes starting Tuesday with two more feedings after
questions.solution: Tuesday + 2 days = Thursday.

questions.question_text: How many petals does the flower in the picture have?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 200 200" width="200" height="200"><circle cx="100" cy="100" r="15" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="100" cy="60" rx="10" ry="20" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="140" cy="100" rx="20" ry="10" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="100" cy="140" rx="10" ry="20" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="60" cy="100" rx="20" ry="10" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="130" cy="70" rx="12" ry="8" transform="rotate(45 130 70)" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="70" cy="70" rx="12" ry="8" transform="rotate(-45 70 70)" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/></svg>
questions.image_description: A flower with petals around a center
questions.solution: There are 4 straight petals and 2 diagonal petals, total 6.

questions.question_text: A baker sells 5 loaves in the morning and 6 loaves in the afternoon. How many loaves did she sell today?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 200 150" width="200" height="150"><text x="10" y="25" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="11">morning</text><ellipse cx="25" cy="50" rx="12" ry="8" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="50" cy="50" rx="12" ry="8" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="75" cy="50" rx="12" ry="8" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="37" cy="65" rx="12" ry="8" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="62" cy="65" rx="12" ry="8" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><text x="110" y="25" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="11">afternoon</text><ellipse cx="120" cy="50" rx="12" ry="8" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="145" cy="50" rx="12" ry="8" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="170" cy="50" rx="12" ry="8" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="125" cy="65" rx="12" ry="8" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="150" cy="65" rx="12" ry="8" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="175" cy="65" rx="12" ry="8" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><text x="20" y="100" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12">5 loaves</text><text x="115" y="100" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12">6 loaves</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Five loaves sold in the morning and six loaves sold in the afternoon
questions.solution: 5 + 6 = 11 loaves.

questions.question_text: Which tree below is the tallest?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 300 120" width="300" height="120"><rect x="25" y="80" width="10" height="30" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><polygon points="30,40 15,80 45,80" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><text x="25" y="118" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10">A</text><rect x="85" y="80" width="10" height="30" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><polygon points="90,20 75,80 105,80" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><text x="85" y="118" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10">B</text><rect x="145" y="80" width="10" height="30" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><polygon points="150,55 135,80 165,80" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><text x="145" y="118" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10">C</text><rect x="205" y="80" width="10" height="30" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><polygon points="210,35 195,80 225,80" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><text x="205" y="118" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10">D</text><rect x="265" y="80" width="10" height="30" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><polygon points="270,50 255,80 285,80" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><text x="265" y="118" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10">E</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Five trees of different heights labeled A to E
questions.solution: Tree B has the highest top at y=20, making it the tallest.

questions.question_text: A garden has tiles arranged as shown. How many square tiles are used in total?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 200 150" width="200" height="150"><rect x="20" y="20" width="30" height="30" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><rect x="50" y="20" width="30" height="30" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><rect x="80" y="20" width="30" height="30" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><rect x="20" y="50" width="30" height="30" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><rect x="50" y="50" width="30" height="30" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><rect x="80" y="50" width="30" height="30" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><rect x="20" y="80" width="30" height="30" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><rect x="50" y="80" width="30" height="30" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/></svg>
questions.image_description: Eight square tiles arranged in a partial grid
questions.solution: Top row 3 + middle row 3 + bottom row 2 = 8 tiles.

questions.question_text: A farmer has 12 chickens. He sells 4 at the market and buys 3 new ones. How many chickens does he have now?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 200 150" width="200" height="150"><text x="10" y="20" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="11">start: 12</text><g fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"><circle cx="15" cy="40" r="5"/><circle cx="30" cy="40" r="5"/><circle cx="45" cy="40" r="5"/><circle cx="60" cy="40" r="5"/><circle cx="75" cy="40" r="5"/><circle cx="90" cy="40" r="5"/><circle cx="15" cy="55" r="5"/><circle cx="30" cy="55" r="5"/><circle cx="45" cy="55" r="5"/><circle cx="60" cy="55" r="5"/><circle cx="75" cy="55" r="5"/><circle cx="90" cy="55" r="5"/></g><text x="10" y="85" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="11">sells 4</text><text x="80" y="85" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="14">-</text><g fill="none" stroke="currentColor"><circle cx="100" cy="80" r="5"/><circle cx="115" cy="80" r="5"/><circle cx="130" cy="80" r="5"/><circle cx="145" cy="80" r="5"/></g><text x="10" y="115" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="11">buys 3</text><text x="80" y="115" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="14">+</text><g fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"><circle cx="100" cy="110" r="5"/><circle cx="115" cy="110" r="5"/><circle cx="130" cy="110" r="5"/></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Twelve chickens, minus four sold, plus three bought
questions.solution: 12 - 4 + 3 = 11 chickens.

questions.question_text: Anna visits her grandmother every 3 days. If she visited on Monday, on which day will her third visit be?
questions.solution: Visit 1 Monday, visit 2 Thursday, visit 3 Sunday.

questions.question_text: The butterfly below is symmetric. How many dots are on one wing?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 250 150" width="250" height="150"><ellipse cx="125" cy="75" rx="6" ry="30" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="85" cy="60" rx="35" ry="25" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="85" cy="95" rx="30" ry="20" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="165" cy="60" rx="35" ry="25" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="165" cy="95" rx="30" ry="20" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><circle cx="75" cy="55" r="3" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="95" cy="65" r="3" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="80" cy="95" r="3" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="95" cy="100" r="3" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="175" cy="55" r="3" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="155" cy="65" r="3" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="170" cy="95" r="3" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="155" cy="100" r="3" fill="currentColor"/></svg>
questions.image_description: Butterfly with dots on both wings
questions.solution: Each wing has 4 dots (two on upper wing, two on lower wing).

questions.question_text: On a tree there are 8 birds. 3 fly away and then 5 more arrive. How many birds are on the tree now?
The fence pattern uses tall and short posts. If the pattern continues, how many tall posts are in the first 10 posts?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 300 100" width="300" height="100"><rect x="10" y="20" width="10" height="70" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><rect x="30" y="50" width="10" height="40" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><rect x="50" y="20" width="10" height="70" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><rect x="70" y="50" width="10" height="40" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><rect x="90" y="20" width="10" height="70" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><rect x="110" y="50" width="10" height="40" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/></svg>
questions.image_description: Fence alternating tall and short posts
questions.solution: Pattern alternates tall, short. First 10 posts contain 5 tall and 5 short.

questions.question_text: A pet shop has dogs, cats, and birds. There are 3 dogs, twice as many cats as dogs, and 2 fewer birds than cats. How many birds are there?
questions.solution: Cats = 2 x 3 = 6. Birds = 6 - 2 = 4.

questions.question_text: How many small squares make up the picture frame shown (including the corners)?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 200 160" width="200" height="160"><g fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"><rect x="20" y="20" width="25" height="25"/><rect x="45" y="20" width="25" height="25"/><rect x="70" y="20" width="25" height="25"/><rect x="95" y="20" width="25" height="25"/><rect x="120" y="20" width="25" height="25"/><rect x="20" y="45" width="25" height="25"/><rect x="120" y="45" width="25" height="25"/><rect x="20" y="70" width="25" height="25"/><rect x="120" y="70" width="25" height="25"/><rect x="20" y="95" width="25" height="25"/><rect x="45" y="95" width="25" height="25"/><rect x="70" y="95" width="25" height="25"/><rect x="95" y="95" width="25" height="25"/><rect x="120" y="95" width="25" height="25"/></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Rectangular frame made of small squares
questions.solution: Top row 5 + bottom row 5 + 2 left middle + 2 right middle = 14 squares.

questions.question_text: At the flower market, 3 tulips cost 12 coins. How many coins do 5 tulips cost?
questions.solution: One tulip costs 12 / 3 = 4 coins. Five tulips cost 5 x 4 = 20 coins.

questions.question_text: Which piece completes the honeycomb pattern to fill the empty hexagon?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 300 150" width="300" height="150"><polygon points="40,30 60,20 80,30 80,50 60,60 40,50" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><polygon points="80,50 100,40 120,50 120,70 100,80 80,70" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><polygon points="40,70 60,60 80,70 80,90 60,100 40,90" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><polygon points="80,90 100,80 120,90 120,110 100,120 80,110" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-dasharray="3,3"/><text x="95" y="105" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="14">?</text></svg>
questions.solution: The pattern is made of hexagons, so a hexagon completes it.

questions.question_text: A festival runs from Friday to Sunday. Each day 7 more flower stalls open than the previous day. If Friday has 4 stalls, how many stalls are there on Sunday?
questions.solution: Friday 4, Saturday 4 + 7 = 11, Sunday 11 + 7 = 18 stalls.

questions.question_text: Count the triangles hidden in the star shape below.
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 200 200" width="200" height="200"><polygon points="100,30 120,90 180,90 130,125 150,180 100,145 50,180 70,125 20,90 80,90" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><polygon points="100,30 80,90 120,90" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"/><polygon points="180,90 130,125 150,180" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"/><polygon points="20,90 70,125 50,180" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"/></svg>
questions.image_description: Five-pointed star with small triangles on three points
questions.solution: The star has 5 small point triangles total.

questions.question_text: A beekeeper checks hives on Monday, Wednesday, and Friday each week. How many hive checks does he do in 4 weeks?
questions.solution: 3 checks per week x 4 weeks = 12 checks.

questions.question_text: The fish pond has 4 lily pads arranged in a square. A frog jumps from one pad to an adjacent pad (sharing a side). Starting from the top-left, what is the fewest number of jumps to reach the bottom-right pad?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 200 200" width="200" height="200"><ellipse cx="60" cy="60" rx="25" ry="18" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="140" cy="60" rx="25" ry="18" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="60" cy="140" rx="25" ry="18" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><ellipse cx="140" cy="140" rx="25" ry="18" fill="#e8e8e8" stroke="currentColor"/><text x="50" y="65" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12">start</text><text x="125" y="145" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12">end</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Four lily pads in a square layout
questions.solution: Top-left to top-right is 1 jump, then to bottom-right is 1 more. Total 2 jumps.

questions.question_text: Three kids stand in a line at the ice cream shop. Ben is not first. Cara is behind Ben. Alex is in front of Ben. Who is first?
questions.solution: Alex is in front of Ben, and Cara is behind Ben. Order: Alex, Ben, Cara. Alex is first.

questions.question_text: A leaf is folded in half along the dashed line. Which picture shows the leaf after unfolding?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 300 120" width="300" height="120"><path d="M 30 60 Q 50 30 70 60 Q 50 90 30 60" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><line x1="50" y1="30" x2="50" y2="90" stroke="currentColor" stroke-dasharray="2,2"/><text x="35" y="115" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10">folded</text><path d="M 130 60 Q 160 20 190 60 Q 160 100 130 60" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><text x="150" y="115" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10">A</text><circle cx="240" cy="60" r="25" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="currentColor"/><text x="235" y="115" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="10">B</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Folded leaf next to unfolded options
questions.solution: Unfolding mirrors the shape across the dashed line, giving a symmetric leaf shape A.
